commit.message:
fix(site): use generic constraint instead of union for localized() params

The `Record<string, unknown> | object` union from the previous fix still
fails in CI — TypeScript resolves against Record<string, unknown> first
and rejects typed interfaces lacking an index signature. Using
`<T extends object>` accepts any object type cleanly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Updated DALL-E prompt to generate icon-only images without background,
scene, or platform. Added background: "transparent" API parameter for
gpt-image-1.

Bumps plugin version to 0.4.0.

commit.message:
fix(site): accept typed interfaces in localized() functions

The previous type tightening from Record<string, any> to
Record<string, unknown> broke typed interface arguments (e.g.
LoyaltyPrivilege) that lack an index signature. Accept `object`
union and cast internally.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(spark-image): add file upload and premium gate for image features

Premium users can now upload images from device and generate AI icons.
Non-premium users see disabled buttons with "Premium" badge. Edge function
validates premium status before generating images.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix OpenAPI response schema for layout endpoints

Replace oneOf with anyOf for layout/storedProfile fields that can be
either array or object. The validator (league/openapi-psr7-validator)
treats empty array [] as matching both array and object types, causing
oneOf (exactly one must match) to throw TooManyValidSchemas. anyOf
(at least one must match) handles this correctly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Add Codex + ElevenLabs services, fix Claude utilization parsing, add Sonnet bar

- Fix critical bug: Claude OAuth API returns utilization as percentage (0-100),
  not fraction (0.0-1.0). Divide by 100 to normalize.
- Fix response parsing: API returns usage data at top level, not wrapped in
  a `data` field. Remove wrapper struct.
- Add Codex service: reads OAuth from ~/.codex/auth.json, calls
  chatgpt.com/backend-api/wham/usage with rate limit headers
- Add ElevenLabs service: API key based, calls
  api.elevenlabs.io/v1/user/subscription for character quota
- Add Grok API key validation via api.x.ai/v1/models
- Remove Gemini (no desktop app, no simple API endpoint)
- Add Sonnet-only 7-day utilization bar to QuotaDisplay
- Add first-class extra credits fields (no more JSON parsing)
- Auto-fetch real usage for all services with session/API access

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

  - 베이커리 카페: orange, 네이버 리뷰 기반
  - 레시피: red, 유튜브 조회수 TOP 100
- Responsive: 2-col philosophy grid on desktop, 1-col on mobile
- Bump: style.css v40→v41

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Kill captain, replace with hub + overseer architecture (#62)

* Kill captain, replace with hub + overseer architecture

Captain agent was in the critical path between voice commands and worker
execution, adding latency and fragility. This restructures the system:

- Rename voice-server → hub: becomes the control plane (creates workers,
  routes voice, manages projects via new worker-manager.js)
- Rename captain → overseer: lightweight monitor that only watches workers,
  nudges lazy ones, and speaks updates (defaults to codex)
- Remove Terminal tab, revamp Projects tab with tiled panes, per-pane input,
  worker creation UI, zoom/fullscreen, idle indicators
- Voice requires explicit pane focus (no smart routing)
- Two-tier idle detection: 30s → overseer pinged, 60s → human pinged via speak
- Hub handles worker CRUD via /api/workers endpoints
- Overseer stripped of create-worker and create_pending_task capabilities

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix test Dockerfile: remove deleted create-worker, add worker-manager.js

The create-worker shell script was removed from the overseer (worker
creation moved to hub's worker-manager.js). Update the test Dockerfile
and worker-dialog spec to reference the new location.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Update tests for new hub + overseer UI structure

- Remove Overseer tab tests for removed terminal/controls elements
- Update element selectors (#mic-btn → #voice-mic-btn, etc.)
- text_command test now expects deprecation error
- Update heartbeat test for new message wording
- Fix integration tests to use pane_send_text instead of text_command
- Update screenshots test for new tab structure
- Fix projects test for 4-tab layout (was 5)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Rename captain.spec.js → overseer.spec.js

Addresses Copilot review comment about inconsistent naming between
the TEST_OVERSEER env var and the old captain.spec.js filename.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix remaining test failures: voice tab navigation and STT error display

- autoread test: navigate to voice tab before checking toggle
- voice-history-modal: expand <details> panel before clicking #voice-summary
- showSttError: display actual error message in voiceTranscriptionEl
  (was showing generic "Error" instead of "timed out" message)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix autoread and STT tests: play count reset, show actual messages

- autoread: Reset __playCount after voice tab click (unlockAudio()
  triggers ttsAudio.play() on user gesture, inflating the count)
- app.js: Show actual transcription/error text in voiceTranscriptionEl

commit.message:
Fix sub-spark kirkastaminen: accepted sub-ideas become siblings, not grandchildren

When clarifying a sub-spark, accepted sub-ideas were created as children of
the sub-spark (grandchildren of the parent), making them invisible in the UI.
Now they are created as siblings (children of the same parent).

commit.message:
fix(plots): use light theme grid method for dark mode visibility

Dark grid was nearly invisible (#2f3541 at 0.4 alpha on #161b26 =
~3% lightness delta). Now uses same method as light theme: 'gray'
(#808080) at 0.3 alpha, producing ~11% delta on dark backgrounds.
Background tint bleeds through at 70%, keeping grid on-palette.

feat: '바로 길찾기' → 현재위치→음식점 네이버 길찾기 링크

- 좌표(lat/lng) 있는 음식점: 현재위치→목적지 대중교통 길찾기
  - 모바일: nmap://route.public?dlat=...&dlng=... (앱 자동 실행)
